description_long: This is a wooden slat bench with a straight, supportive backrest and a seat composed of evenly spaced wooden planks. The bench is supported by sturdy, dark metal legs that are floor-anchored and slightly angled for stability. The wood has a natural finish, showing visible grain and some knots, giving it a rustic yet functional appearance. The backrest and seat are both made from the same type of wood, and the bench lacks armrests, making it accessible from either side. The design is simple and robust, suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for multiple users.
description: A rustic wooden slat bench with a straight backrest and sturdy dark metal legs, designed for public outdoor use. The bench features a natural wood finish and lacks armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden slats and the angled metal legs, highlighting the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the bench, the evenly spaced wooden slats, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the profile of the seat and backrest as well as the metal leg structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wooden slats and the supporting metal frame, with the mounting points of the legs visible.
attribute_leg_design: two angled dark metal legs with cross supports
